differential_diagnoses: Lymphoma (e.g., indolent B-cell lymphoma with extranodal involvement)
next_steps: BRAF V600E mutation testing on the tibial biopsy specimen
Pathology re-review with immunostaining for CD1a, langerin, CD68, CD163, factor XIIIa, and S100
Serum or urine protein electrophoresis and immunofixation for monoclonal protein detection
Repeat bone marrow biopsy with flow cytometry and molecular analysis for clonal B-cell or histiocytic populations
Echocardiogram and cardiovascular MRI to evaluate for cardiac involvement typical of Erdheim-Chester disease
